game.title: El volcán
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango must escape from the erupting volcano by running downhill

mechanics.core_loop: Player taps/swipes to make Coco jump over obstacles while running downhill automatically

obstacles.behavior: Static wide obstacle, high jump required

states.hit: Brief invulnerability after collision, lose life
states.ended: Show GameEndScreen with score and stars

visuals.background: Volcanic mountain gradient (red/orange at top to gray/brown at bottom)
visuals.character: Coco (green lizard) running animation - can use CSS keyframes
visuals.lava_flow: Animated lava flowing down from top (chasing effect)

instructions_text: ¡Corre! Toca para saltar, desliza para esquivar las rocas y la lava.
implementation_notes: Use requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps game loop
Obstacles spawn at top and move down (gives illusion of running)
Coco stays in lower third of screen, moves between 3 lanes
Lava line at top slowly descends if player is too slow (optional pressure mechanic)
Touch-first controls, mouse click = tap for desktop
